The '''Mlukis''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] primate [[Species/Legends|species]] indigenous to [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]]. They grew to adolescence at the age of seven and were considered old at the age of thirty. [[Jevax]] was a Mluki.<ref name="CotJ" />

{{Species-stub}}
